expected_behavior: The valid krn-init manifest fixture parses through @krn/contracts and preserves dry-run mode, an interpretation caveat, and all final-shaped bootstrap capabilities.
failure_mode: The init contract can no longer validate its own canonical example.

expected_behavior: The known-bad fixture using forbidden write mode fails deterministically.
failure_mode: The validator accepts a manifest that violates dry-run-only semantics.

expected_behavior: The known-bad fixture missing the source_pointers bootstrap capability fails deterministically.
failure_mode: The validator accepts a final-shaped init manifest that does not route source/pattern pointers into the repo bootstrap plan.

expected_behavior: The CLI writes a dry-run manifest under .krn/init and the generated manifest parses through @krn/contracts with all final-shaped bootstrap capabilities.
failure_mode: The first CLI consumer no longer produces a schema-backed dry-run runtime artifact.

expected_behavior: The CLI stores an append-only init_bootstrap proposal for the agent_instructions capability under .krn/proposals, backed by the generated init manifest, without mutating AGENTS.md.
assertions: proposal source refs resolve to generated init manifest
failure_mode: The first reviewed init proposal target mutates AGENTS.md directly, does not land in the proposal store, or lacks source-backed manifest evidence.

expected_behavior: The CLI applies a generated agent_instructions proposal only after an approved review decision and writes AGENTS.md from the exact promotion payload.
failure_mode: The first init apply path can write AGENTS.md without an approved decision or without exact payload provenance.

expected_behavior: The CLI applies a generated local_config proposal only after an approved review decision and writes .krn/config.toml from the exact promotion payload without embedding active-goal truth.
failure_mode: The local config init apply path can write config without an approved decision, without exact payload provenance, or with live product truth embedded in runtime config.

expected_behavior: The CLI applies a generated source_pointers proposal only after an approved review decision and writes .krn/sources/index.json from the exact promotion payload without copying active source truth.
assertions: source seed avoids copied source truth
failure_mode: The source_pointers init apply path can write source graph seed without an approved decision, without exact payload provenance, or with active source truth copied into runtime config.

expected_behavior: The CLI applies a generated context_pointers proposal only after an approved review decision and writes .krn/context/index.json from the exact promotion payload without storing memory bodies or active-goal truth.
assertions: context pointer seed avoids memory bodies and active-goal truth
failure_mode: The context_pointers init apply path can write context setup without an approved decision, without exact payload provenance, or with memory bodies / active task truth copied into runtime config.
